ticket.title: Improve logging across the worker
ticket.description: We need better logs from the worker. It's hard to debug failed runs. Make it better.

specBundle.content:
# Improve worker logging

The Temporal worker in `src/cli/worker.ts` currently only logs activity start/end. Operators want richer signal so failed runs are easier to triage.

Proposed: add structured logs with `runId`, `ticketId`, `phase` on every activity boundary.

## Acceptance criteria
_(none specified — see open questions)_

- [ ] Add structured logger
- [ ] Wire it into worker activities
- [ ] Maybe also add metrics?
- [ ] Maybe restructure the worker startup sequence while we're in there

operatorComments: Note: there's an open question on what log format we want — JSON lines vs pino. The specifier flagged this but we said 'just pick one and ship it'.
